senses.definition: an individual who has gained a significant level of fame, popularity, or influence through their activities, content, or presence on the Internet
someone who is active on YouTube by creating content for it

examples.x: My cousin is a YouTuber who makes videos about video games.
Have you seen that YouTuber who does cooking tutorials?
I watch a YouTuber who reviews the latest tech gadgets every week.
That YouTuber’s prank videos always make me laugh.

senses.definition: a person who regularly updates a blog or a social media account by short videos
someone who encourages other people to purchase a product or service by talking about it on social media
an individual who maintains and regularly adds new content to a blog

examples.x: The blogger published a new blog post discussing the latest trends in fashion.
As a lifestyle blogger, she shared her passion for cooking by posting delicious recipes and cooking tips on her blog.
The fashion blogger's Instagram account attracted a large following with her daily outfit posts and style inspiration.
With her expertise in personal finance, the blogger provided valuable advice and money-saving tips to her readers through her blog.

senses.definition: an individual responsible for overseeing and managing an organization's or individual's social media presence, including creating content, engaging with the audience, monitoring performance, and implementing social media strategies

examples.x: He hired a social media manager to boost the company's online presence and improve customer interaction.
As a social media manager, she helps businesses grow by creating content that resonates with their target audience.
My friend works as a social media manager for a local coffee shop, and she handles all their Instagram posts.
A good social media manager knows how to respond to followers quickly and keep the conversation going.

senses.definition: an individual who produces and publishes various forms of content, such as videos, articles, graphics, or social media posts, with the purpose of engaging and attracting an audience on digital platforms

examples.x: As a content creator, he spends hours editing his videos to make them look perfect.
As a content creator, she carefully plans her posts to keep her followers engaged.
Being a content creator allows him to express his creativity and connect with a wide audience.
Many content creators collaborate with brands to promote new products on social media.

senses.definition: an individual or organization that promotes a product, service, or message through various marketing and advertising channels to reach and influence the target audience

examples.x: The advertiser created a catchy commercial to promote their new product.
Advertisers are constantly finding new ways to catch the attention of consumers.
As an advertiser, she knows how to target the right audience for each campaign.
The advertiser studied customer feedback to improve the next ad campaign.
He worked as an advertiser for a large company before starting his own agency.

senses.definition: a professional who is responsible for strategizing and deciding how and where to place advertising and promotional messages to effectively reach the target audience

examples.x: The media planner worked with the marketing team to ensure the ad was placed in the right magazines.
After reviewing the data, the media planner suggested shifting the ad budget to online platforms.
The media planner created a strategy to promote the new show during prime time to attract more viewers.
As a media planner, she spends hours researching the best times to air ads for maximum views.

senses.definition: an individual who interacts with a particular system, platform, or service, such as a website, application, or social media platform
a person who spends a lot of time online navigating through different websites
an individual who has chosen to follow or subscribe to a particular user, page, or channel

examples.x: The channel gained 500 new subscribers after the video went viral.
She is a loyal subscriber to several fitness channels on YouTube.
The app’s new feature attracted many subscribers in just one week.
A subscriber of the podcast commented on how informative the episodes were.
The website saw a significant increase in subscribers after launching its new course.

senses.definition: a person who follows an account on social media
someone who greatly admires or is interested in someone or something

examples.x: As a fan of history, he enjoys reading about different time periods.
My friend is a huge fan of classic literature and reads old novels.
My little brother is a fan of animals and dreams of becoming a zookeeper.
She's a devoted fan of that famous singer and knows all her songs.
Soccer fans from all over the city gathered to watch the final match.

senses.definition: an individual who leaves comments or feedback on social media posts to engage with the content and interact with other users

examples.x: The commenter shared their thoughts on the new movie in the discussion thread.
Many commenters agreed that the recipe was easy to follow and delicious.
After the post went viral, hundreds of commenters added their opinions in the comments section.
Some commenters raised concerns about the changes to the website’s layout.

senses.definition: a group of individuals who receive, consume, or engage with a particular form of media, such as television shows, films, performances, or social media content

examples.x: The TV show attracted a large audience last night.
The film's audience enjoyed the thrilling action scenes.
Social media influencers cater to a specific audience.
The audience for online gaming has grown rapidly in recent years.
The marketing campaign targeted a niche audience with specific interests.

senses.definition: an individual or organization that creates and supplies original content, such as articles, videos, or audio, for distribution or publication on various media platforms, including websites, social media, or broadcasting channels

examples.x: The content provider regularly uploads videos about healthy recipes to their YouTube channel.
As a content provider, she writes blogs for several travel websites.
The streaming platform partnered with a new content provider to offer more movies and TV shows.
He is a content provider for a popular social media platform, sharing daily updates and tips.

senses.definition: a professional responsible for managing and maintaining the public image and communications of an individual or organization

examples.x: The public relations specialist worked hard to improve the company's image after the scandal.
She hired a public relations specialist to help with the launch of her new product.
The public relations specialist quickly responded to the negative news story to protect the brand’s reputation.
He’s a public relations specialist, and his job is to make sure the company’s message reaches the right audience.
